linkedin_profile.headline: Commercial Director - The Landmark London & Group Director of Revenue Management
linkedin_profile.about:
With demonstrated expertise and significant experience, I am accomplished and results-driven management professional and consultant performing in “Luxury & Upscale “international and local chain hotel industry across diverse regions. I have proven success implementing best practices, creating positive impact in crisis situations, and optimising profits/business growth. I have innate ability to lead high performance teams, streamline business process, and exceed clients’ expectations. I proved to be a collaborative communicator; focused on building relationships with stakeholders and prompting synergy across clients and business lines to drive a positive change. Adapted quickly to aggressive conditions by applying extreme marketing and collaborative revenue sharing models in declining tourism industry of Turkey to decrease 41% occupancy/65% REVPAR. Initiated affiliate marketing to reduce PPC expenses by applying commission base transaction model Implemented a Multi Property Management System for 18 hotels in 4 months to have single source of data to create and run CRM & Loyalty Programs of the Brand.

Total Experience: 3 years and 5 months

linkedin_profile.headline: Chief Executive Officer at THE LANCASTER LANDMARK HOTEL COMPANY LIMITED
linkedin_profile.about: Fergus commenced his role with Jumeirah Hotels and Resorts in August 2019. Initially overseeing the European portfolio with an emphasis on the closure of Jumeirah Carlton Towers in Knightsbridge and kick starting the re-positioning and reopening of this iconic hotel. In a pre planned transfer he moved to Dubai in January 2020 Jumeirah is a global luxury hotel company and operates and manages a world-class portfolio of 15 properties in the Middle East including the flagship Burj Al Arab, 5 properties in Europe and 4 in Asia with 10 properties currently under construction around the globe. Prior to this Fergus worked for Intercontinental Hotel Group joining them in March 2008 as General Manager of the ANA Intercontinental Tokyo. In July 2009 he was promoted to Area General Manager, then to Regional General Manager in November 2010 and oversaw all properties in the Greater Tokyo Area. In 2012 Fergus was promoted to Director of Operations Thailand and Indochina and subsequently took up the role as Head of Japan and CEO of the joint venture IHGANA in January 2014. In January 2016 Fergus took up the role as Vice President Middle East and in September 2017 he was promoted to Vice President Luxury Division Europe. Fergus trained at the Central Hotel Glasgow and started his career at the Grosvenor House Hotel in London. Prior to his current London based role he has spent almost 25 years working extensively overseas in 11 different countries including Japan, Hong Kong, Singapore, Thailand and the UAE. Prior to joining IHG Fergus’s extensive operational experience in these countries was gained mainly from working with the Shangri-la and Hyatt organisations. Originally from Scotland, Fergus obtained the UK Diploma in Hotel Catering and Institutional Operations as well as the Cornell Executive Program in Hospitality Management through the National University of Singapore. Fergus is married with 2 daughters aged 18 and 16. He is a keen golfer and follower of rugby and football.

linkedin_profile.headline: Director of Food and Beverage @ The Landmark London | Hospitality expert
linkedin_profile.about:
With over 25 years of experience in the hospitality industry, I am a dedicated and passionate director of food and beverage at The Landmark London, one of the most iconic and prestigious hotels in the UK. I oversee the operations and management of all the food and beverage outlets, including the restaurants, bars, lounges, and banqueting facilities, ensuring the highest standards of quality, service, and guest satisfaction. I have a proven track record of leading and developing high-performing teams, optimizing labor and food costs, enhancing menu offerings, and delivering exceptional catering and banqueting services for a variety of events and occasions. I have also successfully implemented innovative and creative strategies to increase revenue, profitability, and customer loyalty. I am always eager to learn new skills, embrace new challenges, and collaborate with other professionals in the hospitality sector. My goal is to create memorable and outstanding food and beverage experiences for every guest at The Landmark London.

Total Experience: 27 years
